name: TIDCO Industrial Plot Allotment for MSMEs
retrieval_text: TIDCO allots developed industrial plots to manufacturing MSMEs in Tamil Nadu at concessional rates through its network of industrial estates across the state. Plots are allotted at 50% of the prevailing guideline value for eligible MSME manufacturing units on plots up to 5 acres. Priority is given to new enterprises, first-generation entrepreneurs, and units in thrust sectors identified by the Tamil Nadu government. This scheme has no direct loan component; it reduces the land acquisition cost for manufacturing MSMEs setting up in designated industrial estates.
